html:
Exclusive to:  

Ceviche is a Crock Pot dish introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is made by combining 2.0 units of Fishes and 1 Ice.

Adding a Wobster will yield Lobster Bisque instead. Adding Jellyfish and Twigs may yield Jelly-O Pop instead. Adding Shark Fin may yield Shark Fin Soup instead. More than one Monster Foods can be added when making this recipe without the fear of turning it into Monster Lasagna, since this recipe has a higher Crock Pot Priority.

Ceviche restores 20 , 25 , and 5 , and reduces body temperature by 1 degree per second for 10 seconds. It can be given to the Yaarctopus in exchange for a Spyglass.

Recipe

×2.0

Examples

×2

33% chance to yield Shark Fin Soup.
33% chance to yield Jelly-O Pop.

Exchange

Trivia

  • Ceviche was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • Ceviche is a popular seafood dish in the coastal areas of Latin America. It's usually fresh raw fish cured in citrus juice and spiced with chili peppers or aji (a sauce made of tomatoes, cilantro, aji peppers, onions, and water).

“Belly goop”
–Wormwood
“If I don't like it, I can always use it for ammo.”
–Wheeler
“Now that's some tasty grub!”
–Winona
“I'd rather leave this for the humans.”
–Wortox
“Blegh. Nuh-uh.”
–Wurt
“Mushy, but tasty.”
–Walter
“Oddly refreshing!”
–Wanda
Ceviche is a Crock Pot dish introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is made by combining 2.0 units of Fishes and 1 Ice.
Adding a Wobster will yield Lobster Bisque instead. Adding Jellyfish and Twigs may yield Jelly-O Pop instead. Adding Shark Fin may yield Shark Fin Soup instead. More than one Monster Foods can be added when making this recipe without the fear of turning it into Monster Lasagna, since this recipe has a higher Crock Pot Priority.
Ceviche restores 20 , 25 , and 5 , and reduces body temperature by 1 degree per second for 10 seconds. It can be given to the Yaarctopus in exchange for a Spyglass.
